items.title: Set up service repository foundation
items.verification: Root service skeleton exists and compose config is coherent

items.title: Build pedestrian network pipeline
items.verification: road_nodes and road_segments load idempotently from Busan OSM

items.title: Fill accessibility attributes with public data ETL
items.verification: Nine routing attributes are populated with coverage evidence

items.title: Prepare GraphHopper engine and profiles
items.verification: Four profiles produce differentiated routes with LM enabled

items.title: Implement walk routing API
items.verification: SAFE_WALK and FAST_WALK return explicit availability and detail payloads

items.title: Load transit reference data
items.verification: Low-floor bus and subway elevator tables can be queried by orchestration

items.title: Implement accessible transit orchestration
items.verification: Accessible transit candidates are filtered and ranked with explicit reasons

items.title: Harden operations and performance readiness
items.verification: Timeouts, health, logging, and GraphHopper swap procedure are documented and tested
